summary: Completed testing of Driver Achievements/Badges System. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and flows verified working. Delivery driver sees Achievements card with 1/18 (5.6%) progress and 1,000 SYP earned. Achievements expand to show all 18 achievements with category filters. Customer correctly denied access to achievements.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Delivery user can access /api/achievements/my-achievements (200 OK)
✅ Backend: Response has correct structure (achievements, stats, categories)
✅ Backend: Total achievements count is 18
✅ Backend: Each achievement has required fields (id, title, description, icon, category, requirement, reward, rarity, is_unlocked, progress)
✅ Backend: Achievements span 5 categories (orders, rating, speed, loyalty, special)
✅ Backend: Achievements have 4 rarities (common, uncommon, rare, legendary)
✅ Backend: first_delivery achievement is unlocked with 🚀 icon and 1,000 SYP reward
✅ Backend: Stats show 1/18 (5.6%), 1,000 SYP rewards earned
✅ Backend: Categories have correct Arabic names and icons
✅ Backend: Progress structure has current, target, percent
✅ Backend: /api/achievements/check-and-unlock returns new_unlocked and count
✅ Backend: /api/achievements/recent returns list with driver_name, achievement, icon, unlocked_at
✅ Backend: Customer cannot access my-achievements (403)
✅ Backend: Customer cannot call check-and-unlock (403)
✅ Backend: Customer cannot view recent achievements (403)
✅ Backend: Unauthenticated user denied (401)
✅ Frontend: Delivery driver sees Achievements card on dashboard
✅ Frontend: Achievements toggle button has data-testid='achievements-toggle'
✅ Frontend: Header shows 'الإنجازات والشارات'
✅ Frontend: Progress shows '1 / 18 إنجاز (5.6%)'
✅ Frontend: Reward badge shows earned amount
✅ Frontend: Achievements expand on click
✅ Frontend: Category filters visible (الكل, الطلبات, التقييمات, السرعة, الولاء, خاصة)
✅ Frontend: Category filters functional - clicking filters achievements
✅ Frontend: Unlocked achievement (🚀 أول توصيل) has green checkmark
✅ Frontend: Locked achievements have lock icon
✅ Frontend: Progress bars display current/target and percentage
✅ Frontend: Rarity labels shown (عادي, غير شائع, نادر, أسطوري)
✅ Frontend: Reward amounts displayed per achievement
✅ Frontend: 'تقدمك الإجمالي' progress bar visible
✅ Frontend: Customer does NOT see achievements (correct behavior)
critical_code_review_comments: DriverAchievements.js correctly uses data-testid='achievements-toggle' for testing
DriverAchievements.js uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Backend correctly restricts all achievement endpoints to delivery users only (403 for customers)
Achievement definitions include all 18 achievements across 5 categories
Wallet integration works - rewards added automatically on achievement unlock
NewAchievementModal component has confetti animation for celebration

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements display and function correctly

seed_data_creation: Driver 'فهد المندوب' has 1 achievement unlocked (first_delivery 🚀) with 1,000 SYP reward
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver Achievements feature fully tested and working. 18 achievements across 5 categories (orders, rating, speed, loyalty, special). 4 rarity levels (common, uncommon, rare, legendary). Driver 'فهد المندوب' has first_delivery unlocked. Achievement rewards auto-add to wallet. Customer correctly denied access. API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_achievements.py

list: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - accepts any 6-digit OTP

achievement_categories.speed: 3 achievements - daily, weekly, monthly order counts

api_endpoints./api/achievements/my-achievements: GET - Returns all 18 achievements with progress, stats, categories
api_endpoints./api/achievements/check-and-unlock: POST - Checks and unlocks eligible achievements, adds rewards to wallet
api_endpoints./api/achievements/recent: GET - Returns recent unlocks across all drivers
